source_blocker.blocked_route: all-axes retained-grid route with grid_points^2 pairwise transition evaluations
source_blocker.replacement_target: fixed-rank factorized or streamed transition application under a memory-bounded deterministic approximation

allowed_evidence_classes.allowed_claim: same-target value or gradient correctness within declared tolerance
allowed_evidence_classes.required_support: exact, dense, or reviewed same-target reference

allowed_evidence_classes.allowed_claim: fixed-route rank self-convergence against a strictly higher feasible rank
allowed_evidence_classes.required_support: same target, same route, only rank cap increased, replay metadata matched

allowed_evidence_classes.allowed_claim: centering, scaling, covariance, and sanity diagnostics only
allowed_evidence_classes.required_support: UKF or block/local UKF manifest labeled scout_not_truth

allowed_evidence_classes.allowed_claim: memory and rank feasibility forecast only
allowed_evidence_classes.required_support: rank-budget manifest with r_max, R_eff source, and cap fields

allowed_evidence_classes.allowed_claim: bounded performance or stability stress under declared cap
allowed_evidence_classes.required_support: d=18 prerequisites, memory preflight, and explicit non-correctness label

dimension_policy.role: first production-like calibration target after route repair
first reasonable full filtering stress maximum
scout and memory preflight by default

forbidden_claims: production spatial SIR readiness from lower-rung diagnostics
d=100 filtering correctness from scout or preflight evidence
HMC readiness from finite values or finite gradients
adaptive TT/SIRT source-faithful filtering inside HMC
dense all-pairs route as production path
human_required_stop_conditions: project-direction decision not already in the reviewed plan
package installation, network fetch, credentials, or environment setup
changing pass/fail criteria after seeing results
interpreting GPU/special hardware results without trusted-context evidence
continuing after Claude and Codex do not converge after five review rounds
